metadata.description: Typecast TTS API integration skills and tools for Claude Code. Covers the API expert agent, code samples, troubleshooting, streaming TTS, timestamp-aligned captions (SRT/VTT), runtime subscription lookup, target_lufs loudness normalization, and the official cast CLI.

plugins.name: typecast-api-expert
plugins.description: Typecast TTS API expert agent. Covers API key setup, code samples, troubleshooting, plan comparison, and the newer surface area: streaming TTS, timestamp-aligned captions (SRT/VTT), runtime subscription lookup, target_lufs loudness normalization, and the cast CLI. Use for 'Typecast API', 'TTS integration', 'streaming TTS', 'TTS captions', 'cast CLI', or 'text-to-speech API' questions.
